violations.description: Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. Bottled honey for sale at check out register. Unlabeled bottles. (Circle B Honey sign posted)
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Detail cleaning needed.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with sufficient mechanical ventilation. Restroom vent fan not working properly.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Unfinished wall in storage/utility area.--Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Popcorn style ceiling in back kitchen.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Minor cleaning needed around line cooking equipment.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Backflow prevention, back siphonage (3 pts deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Fruits and vegetables washed, handling, sink provided (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
